data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, specifically mentioning that they should be hashed where needed. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that confirm the implementation of such storage practices. The absence of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers (hashed where needed).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for privacy-first storage
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers.
